name: Snare Hook
title: Phantom Flash: Snare Hook
desc: "There are few truly inescapable traps in this world, for even the densest web can be threaded with a needle.\nGlimmers of hope can be found between the hooks and cages of even a trap set to kill.\nJust as no one can fully lock away their heart, even the most cautious defenses must eventually falter."
in_play_description:
The character deals +2 DMG with their Elemental Burst.
When you trigger an Elemental Reaction: Gain 1 stack of Phantom Flash. When Phantom Flash is at 2 or more stacks, consume 2 stacks of Phantom Flash to grant the attached character 1 Energy.

skills.desc:
The character deals +2 DMG with their Elemental Burst.
When you trigger an Elemental Reaction: Gain 1 stack of Phantom Flash. When Phantom Flash is at 2 or more stacks, consume 2 stacks of Phantom Flash to grant the attached character 1 Energy.
(Only Bow characters can equip this. A character can equip a maximum of 1 Weapon)
